skills.name: Agility
skills.description: Applies a buff to your party members' and your boots which reduces Stamina consumption and increases Movement Speed. The Agility buff does not apply to characters not wearing boots.
skills.effect_text:
Decreases STA Consumption by CaptionRatio %
Increases Movement Speed by CaptionRatio2
Duration: 30 minutes

skills.name: Enchant Earth
skills.description: Enchant the weapon of you and your party with the power of the earth to increase the Block Penetration value. (The final efficiency is reduced when the highest Physical ATK of the caster is lower than the highest ATK of the target. Not applied to ATK increased by buff.)
skills.effect_text:
Increases Block Penetration Value by CaptionRatio %
Duration: 30 minutes

skills.name: Over-Reinforce
skills.description: Increases Physical Attack and Magic Attack of you and your party members proportionally to your basic ATK.

skills.name: Enchant Glove
skills.description: Applies a buff to your and your party members' gloves which increases Accuracy. The Enchant Gloves buff does not apply to characters not equipping gloves.(The final efficiency is reduced when the highest Physical ATK of the caster is lower than the highest ATK of the target. Not applied to ATK increased by buff.)
skills.effect_text:
Increases Accuracy by CaptionRatio %
Duration: 30 minutes

skills.name: Enchant Aura
skills.description: Opens an area that lasts where you were, dealing periodic damage to enemies in the area.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per CaptionRatio2 seconds
Consumes SP by CaptionRatio per CaptionRatio2 seconds
Targets: 5

attributes.name: Enchant Weapon: Lightning
attributes.description:
* [Lightning] buff stacks when attacking the enemy and 1 stack decreases every second (Maximum 15 stacks)

* Final Damage increases by 1% per [Lightning] buff stack

attributes.name: Enchant Glove: Enchant
attributes.description:
* Increases [Enchant Gloves]'s accuracy increasing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Agility: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Agility]'s reduced STA consumption and Movement Speed by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Enchant Weapon: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Enchant Weapon]'s Critical Rate increasing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Enchant Earth: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Enchant Earth]'s block penetration increasing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Over-Reinforce: ALL
attributes.description:
* Physical Defense, Magic Defense of ally increases by 20%

* Decreases the Defense efficiency when the caster's highest Physical Attack is lower than the target's higher Attack (Attack increased due to buff is not applied)

attributes.name: Enchant Aura: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Enchant Aura] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Enchant Aura: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Enchant Aura] by 1.25% per attribute level
